task.summary: Default task

feat(sheet): add GetHeadersName method to WorksheetService
- Introduced GetHeadersName method to retrieve column headers from the first row of a specified content range (enhances data retrieval capabilities). - Refactored GetRowContent method to maintain functionality while improving code structure.
[skip ci] chore: add copilot-instructions.md

refactor(download): complete almost workflows for PrepareImages.cs
- Updated class names for clarity and consistency (improves code readability). - Refactored DownloadManager to use new class names. - Enhanced copilot instructions for better architectural guidance.
refactor!(backend): Merge Framework into Domain, Application, Infastructure (part 1)
chore(backend): Make ReadOnlyWorksheet constructor internal

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

chore(backend): improve business logic on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

chore(backend): improve business logic and field naming on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

feat: add GenerationWorkflow workflow, rename Generating -> Generation
- Moved various activity classes to the new Generation namespace for better organization and clarity (improves maintainability). - Updated constructors in several activities to use required properties instead of nullable ones (enhances type safety). - Updated CleanupResources activity to manage multi temporary resources during workflow execution (promotes resource management).

feat: add GenerationWorkflow workflow, rename Generating -> Generation
- Moved various activity classes to the new Generation namespace for better organization and clarity (improves maintainability). - Updated constructors in several activities to use required properties instead of nullable ones (enhances type safety). - Updated CleanupResources activity to manage multi temporary resources during workflow execution (promotes resource management).

feat(backend)!: add ScanningService, refactoring Slide entities
- Updated namespaces for clarity and consistency (e.g., SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models to SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models.Previews). - Modified method signatures to remove default parameters for better readability (e.g., GetOrOpen method). - Introduced new interfaces and classes for better abstraction (e.g., IImageReplacer, ITextReplacer).
chore(backend): update packages

refactor: refactoring Images module
- Renamed FaceDetectorModelKey to FaceDetectorModel for clarity. - Updated RoiType enum values for better understanding (RuleOfThirds to Center and vice versa). - Introduced new classes for CenterOption and RuleOfThirdsOption to encapsulate ROI strategies. - Refactored FaceDetector and related classes to improve maintainability and readability.
[skip ci] chore(backend): cleanup and reformat
refactor(workflows): refactoring workflows models to Application Layer

refactor(workflows): Rearchitect concurrency and processing in GeneratingWorkflow
This commit introduces a major refactoring of the GeneratingWorkflow to improve concurrency control, modularity, and clarity. The previous implementation used rigid, monolithic activities for batch processing, which has been replaced with a more flexible, granular, and robust system.
Key Changes:
- **Introduced `IAsyncKeyedLocker<SlotType>`:** Replaced hardcoded concurrency limits with a generic, keyed locking mechanism. This allows defining flexible, process-wide concurrency gates (e.g., for downloads, image edits, slide edits) that are managed centrally.
- **Generic `AcquireSlot` and `ReleaseSlot` Activities:** The numerous specific slot activities (e.g., `AcquirePreparingSlot`, `AcquireEditingSlot`) have been removed and replaced by a single, reusable pair of `AcquireSlot` and `ReleaseSlot` activities. These now operate on the `IAsyncKeyedLocker` by specifying a `SlotType`.
- **Parallel-Per-Item Processing:** The monolithic `DownloadImages` and `EditImages` activities have been replaced with a `ParallelForEach` pattern. The workflow now iterates over a collection of items (URLs or paths), and each item is processed individually within its own `AcquireSlot`/`ReleaseSlot` block. This provides fine-grained control over the degree of parallelism.
- **Renamed Activities for Clarity:** - `SummarizeDownloadedImagePaths` is now `ReadDownloadedImagePathStore`. - `SummarizeEditedImagePaths` is now `ReadEditedImagePathStore`. This better reflects their function of reading results from the transient workflow store.
- **Code Cleanup:** Removed numerous obsolete activity files and updated dependencies across the workflow and related services to support the new architecture.

refactor(workflows): Decouple Application layer from Elsa workflow engine
- Introduced a custom workflow DSL (`Activity`, `Sequence`, `ForEach`, `ParallelForEach`, `Inline`, `SlotGated`) and state management (`Variable`, `IExecutionContext`) in the Application layer. - Added `IActivityFactory` to abstract workflow activity creation. - Migrated all generation workflow activities to use the new Application-layer DSL, removing direct Elsa dependencies (e.g., `Input<T>`, `Output<T>`, `ActivityExecutionContext`). - Refactored `GeneratingWorkflow` to construct the execution tree using the new `IActivityFactory` and strongly-typed context variables. - Introduced `WorksheetContextRules` to standardize workflow variable keys for the generation process. - Implemented Elsa-specific adapters (`ElsaSequence`, `ElsaInline`, `ElsaForEach`, `ElsaParallelForEach`, `ElsaSlotGated`, `ElsaVariable`, `ElsaExecutionContext`) and `ElsaActivityFactory` in the Infrastructure layer. - Reorganized the project structure by moving generating and scanning components to the `Services` namespace. - Updated `CLAUDE.md` to document the architectural constraint that Elsa dependencies must reside exclusively in the Infrastructure layer.

docs: add comprehensive XML documentation and minor refactorings
- Added extensive XML documentation to interfaces, classes, properties, and methods across the Domain, Application, and Infrastructure layers to improve maintainability. - Relocated IClientService to the Cloud.Abstractions namespace for better logical organization. - Enhanced resource management by adding GC.SuppressFinalize(this) to the Dispose methods of Mat, StreamTextFile, and YuNet. - Improved thread safety in YuNet.DeInitAsync by ensuring the semaphore is released within a try-finally block. - Removed the obsolete ImageReplacer class in favor of using PictureReplacer and BlipFillReplacer directly. - Corrected an exception message typo in StreamTextFile.Write to accurately reflect read-only file states.
chore(backend): clean up and reformat code

refactor(generating): resolve instructions per-row instead of pre-flattening
- Introduced the `InstructionResolver` service to evaluate general instructions against row content and produce specialized instructions with actual values. - Updated the `ISpecializable.Flatten` method signature to require row data, shifting value resolution logic to the execution phase. - Modified `SpecializedInstruction` models for both images and texts to store resolved values (`Uri` and `string`) rather than column source definitions. - Refactored the `SpecializeInstructions` activity to filter and store general instructions in the context, removing premature flattening. - Adapted `ResolveImageUrls`, `DownloadImage`, `ResolveImagePathsFromDisk`, and `ReplaceSlideContents` activities to process the new instruction structure and per-row resolved values. - Added a `Utilities.NormalizeUri` helper to standardize URI formatting during image resolution.

refactor(workflows)!: transition to custom C# DSL and WorkflowCore
- Introduced a custom Workflow-as-Code DSL (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`, `SlotGatedNode`) in the Application layer. - Implemented strongly-typed, stateless `Variable<T>` and `IActivityContext` for lexical scoping and isolated state management across concurrent branches. - Integrated `WorkflowCore` in the Infrastructure layer to interpret and execute the custom DSL via a single `WcInterpreterStep`. - Refactored `GeneratingWorkflow` and all related activities to implement `ILeafActivity<WorkflowTask>`, completely removing dependencies on Elsa. - Added hierarchical state monitoring (`ExecutionState`, `WorkflowState`) and thread-safe, in-memory logging (`Logger`, `LogEntry`). - Replaced `ScanningService` with modular `ScanWorkbook` and `ScanPresentation` leaf activities. - Redesigned temporary output paths to use deterministic, hash-based folder structures for downloaded and edited images. - Renamed replacer abstractions to composers (e.g., `ITextReplacer` to `ITextComposer`, `IImageReplacer` to `IImageComposer`). - Extended the `IImage` interface and its `Mat` implementation with `Crop`, `Resize`, and `SaveAsync` capabilities. - Updated `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` and `CLAUDE.md` to document the new DSL architecture, variable scoping rules, and strict dependency constraints.

refactor: reorganize application core features into Modules directory
- Relocated multiple root application directories (Cloud, Download, Images, Resources, Settings, Slides, Systems, Workflows) into a new `Modules` directory to improve project organization. - Updated namespaces and using directives across the Application and Infrastructure layers to align with the new `Modules` path structure. - Moved WorkflowCore-specific infrastructure implementations (e.g., `WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcExecutionContext`) into a dedicated `Adapters` subfolder within `SlideGenerator.Infrastructure/Workflows`. - Deleted the obsolete `AssemblyInfo.cs` file from the Application project. - Updated the Application `.csproj` file to replace the old `Cloud` folder inclusion with the new `Modules` directory.
[skip ci] chore(backend): reformat and cleanup code
[skip ci] chore: Update Instructions

refactor(workflows)!: transition to variable-based persistence and robust resource locking
- Replaced `ExecutionState` with `ExecutionSnapshot`, splitting transient context (`IExecutionContext`) from persisted variables (`IExecutionPayload`). - Eliminated mutable state objects (e.g., `SheetTask`) in favor of strict, scope-based `Variable<T>` persistence for workflow execution. - Refactored `Registry` implementations to support shared-read/exclusive-write locking using `FileLocker`. - Introduced `GateLocker`, `GateNode`, and `GateType`, replacing `SlotGatedNode` and `SlotType` for granular concurrency throttling. - Extracted custom DSL interpretation logic from `WcInterpreterStep` into a dedicated `WorkflowInterpreter` service. - Updated generation and scanning activities to manage data, instructions, and open file leases exclusively through scope variables. - Introduced `Lease<T>` and `ILock` abstractions for reliable, strongly-typed resource lifecycle management. - Updated documentation (INSTRUCTIONS.MD, CLAUDE.md) to reflect new variable scope rules, registry patterns, and strict architectural constraints.

refactor(workflows)!: transition to variable-based persistence and robust resource locking
- Replaced `ExecutionState` with `ExecutionSnapshot`, splitting transient context (`IExecutionContext`) from persisted variables (`IExecutionPayload`). - Eliminated mutable state objects (e.g., `SheetTask`) in favor of strict, scope-based `Variable<T>` persistence for workflow execution. - Refactored `Registry` implementations to support shared-read/exclusive-write locking using `FileLocker`. - Introduced `GateLocker`, `GateNode`, and `GateType`, replacing `SlotGatedNode` and `SlotType` for granular concurrency throttling. - Extracted custom DSL interpretation logic from `WcInterpreterStep` into a dedicated `WorkflowInterpreter` service. - Updated generation and scanning activities to manage data, instructions, and open file leases exclusively through scope variables. - Introduced `Lease<T>` and `ILock` abstractions for reliable, strongly-typed resource lifecycle management. - Updated documentation (INSTRUCTIONS.MD, CLAUDE.md) to reflect new variable scope rules, registry patterns, and strict architectural constraints.
[skip ci] chore(backend): reformat and cleanup code
[skip ci] chore(backend): reformat and cleanup code
[skip ci] chore(backend): reformat and cleanup code

refactor(infrastructure): Transition to Syncfusion libraries for slide and sheet processing
- Replaced OpenXML and ClosedXML implementations with Syncfusion equivalents (e.g., SfPresentation, SfReadOnlyWorkbook, SfImageComposer, SfTextComposer). - Moved sheet identifier models (e.g., WorkbookIdentifier, WorksheetIdentifier) to the Models.Identifiers namespace for better organization. - Introduced GetPreview methods in IReadOnlyWorksheet, IReadOnlySlide, and IReadOnlyShape to generate lightweight visual and data previews. - Simplified SlidePreview to only retain the index and image, promoting Id and Name metadata to SlideSummary. - Updated ScanWorkbook and ScanPresentation activities to adopt the new preview rendering approaches. - Removed the Scan method from IImageComposer as preview extraction is now handled directly by shapes. - Cleaned up obsolete XML and ClosedXML adapters, services, and the GeneratingService. - Added Syncfusion packages to the infrastructure project dependencies.

```text refactor(workflows): replace centralized interpreter with self-executing activity DSL
- Removed the centralized `WorkflowInterpreter` and record-based DSL nodes (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`). - Introduced an object-oriented `Activity<TData>` base class with self-executing implementations (`Sequence`, `Parallel`, `ForEach`, `Try`, `Condition`, `Inline`, `GateWrapper`). - Renamed `Variable<T>` to `Handle<T>` to better represent workflow-scoped references. - Renamed `IActivityContext` to `IExecutionContext`, renaming the `State` property to `Snapshot` and exposing an `IServiceProvider` for internal dependency resolution. - Renamed `IWorkflowDefinition` to `IWorkflow` and updated implementations to construct activity trees using the new DSL. - Refactored `GateLocker` to be a generic `GateLocker<TGate>` that accepts a resolver function for determining concurrency limits. - Updated all leaf activities to implement `Activity<TData>` instead of `ILeafActivity<TData>`. - Updated WorkflowCore infrastructure adapters (`WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcInterpreterContext`) to support the new interface types and execute the activity tree directly. - Updated architectural documentation (`INSTRUCTIONS.MD`, `CLAUDE.md`) to reflect the new terminology and scope management guidelines. ```

refactor(workflows): replace centralized interpreter with self-executing activity DSL
- Removed the centralized `WorkflowInterpreter` and record-based DSL nodes (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`). - Introduced an object-oriented `Activity<TData>` base class with self-executing implementations (`Sequence`, `Parallel`, `ForEach`, `Try`, `Condition`, `Inline`, `GateWrapper`). - Renamed `Variable<T>` to `Handle<T>` to better represent workflow-scoped references. - Renamed `IActivityContext` to `IExecutionContext`, renaming the `State` property to `Snapshot` and exposing an `IServiceProvider` for internal dependency resolution. - Renamed `IWorkflowDefinition` to `IWorkflow` and updated implementations to construct activity trees using the new DSL. - Refactored `GateLocker` to be a generic `GateLocker<TGate>` that accepts a resolver function for determining concurrency limits. - Updated all leaf activities to implement `Activity<TData>` instead of `ILeafActivity<TData>`. - Updated WorkflowCore infrastructure adapters (`WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcInterpreterContext`) to support the new interface types and execute the activity tree directly. - Updated architectural documentation (`INSTRUCTIONS.MD`, `CLAUDE.md`) to reflect the new terminology and scope management guidelines.

refactor!: restructure solution into feature-based projects and standardize on Syncfusion
This commit represents a major architectural refactoring, migrating from a traditional layered architecture (Application, Domain, Infrastructure) to a feature-sliced design. It also removes complex abstraction layers over file formats by standardizing exclusively on Syncfusion libraries for document processing.
- **Restructured Solution Architecture:** - Replaced `SlideGenerator.Application`, `SlideGenerator.Domain`, and `SlideGenerator.Infrastructure` with specialized feature projects: `Cloud`, `Download`, `Gate`, `Images`, `Registry`, `Settings`, `Sheets`, `Slides`, and `Workflows`.
- **Standardized on Syncfusion:** - Removed OpenXML and ClosedXML dependencies entirely. - Deleted custom document abstractions (`IPresentation`, `IReadOnlyWorkbook`, `IShape`, `ISlide`) in favor of directly utilizing `Syncfusion.Presentation.NET` and `Syncfusion.XlsIO.NET`. - Refactored `SfTextComposer` and `SfImageComposer` to operate directly on Syncfusion components.
- **Simplified External Integrations:** - Removed generic abstraction interfaces such as `IClientService`, `IDownloadService`, and `IImageDecoder`. - Adopted direct usage of `HttpClient`, `Downloader`, `Magick.NET`, and `OpenCvSharp` in their respective feature modules. - Moved Face Detection (`YuNet`) and ROI calculations into the `Images` project, and included the `YuNet.onnx` model binary natively.
- **Refactored Workflows:** - Moved `GeneratingWorkflow`, `ScanningWorkflow`, and all related steps to the `Workflows` project. - Updated workflow state data and activities to consume the new feature-sliced services and Syncfusion models.
- **Streamlined Settings and Concurrency:** - Consolidated configuration and YAML serialization into `SlideGenerator.Settings`. - Moved concurrency gating logic into `SlideGenerator.Gate`. - Simplified asynchronous file locking into a generic `FileRegistry<T>` in `SlideGenerator.Registry`.

refactor(images,slides): adopt MagickImage-first architecture and static composers
This commit migrates the primary image processing pipeline from OpenCV to ImageMagick and refactors the Syncfusion slide composition services to use static utility classes, simplifying dependency management and improving image handling.
- **MagickImage-First Architecture:** - Updated `SlideGenerator.Images` to use `MagickImage` as the primary format for image manipulation. - Modified `RoiResolver`, `RoiCalculator`, `CenterRoi`, and `RuleOfThirdsRoi` to accept `MagickImage`, converting to OpenCV `Mat` internally only when required for face detection. - Refactored `Images/Utilities.cs` by replacing `Mat`-based operations with `ToMat()` and `ToMagick()` format conversion extensions. - Updated the `EditImage` workflow activity to use `MagickImage` for decoding, cropping, and resizing operations instead of relying on `IImageDecoder` and OpenCV.
- **Static Slide Composers:** - Replaced injected `SfImageComposer` and `SfTextComposer` with static `ImageComposer` and `TextComposer` classes. - Enhanced `TextComposer` with intelligent context-aware data parsing (Excel arrays, JSON, comma-separated values) before rendering mustache templates via Stubble. - Enhanced `ImageComposer` to support direct replacements using `MagickImage`, `Stream`, and `byte[]`. - Recreated `Slides/Utilities.cs` to provide static extension methods for extracting shape and slide previews natively as `MagickImage` instances. - Updated `EditSlide` activity to consume the static composers directly, removing them from constructor injection. - Deleted `SlidesRegistration.cs` as the slide services are now static utilities.
- **Project Configuration & Restructuring:** - Disabled packing by adding `<IsPackable>false</IsPackable>` to all module `.csproj` files (`Cloud`, `Download`, `Gate`, `Images`, `Settings`, `Sheets`, `Slides`). - Removed the `Syncfusion.PresentationRenderer.NET` dependency from the `Slides` project. - Reorganized `Slides` project structure by moving `PresentationExtension.cs` to `Models/` and `SfPresentation.cs` to `Entities/`. - Fixed `YamlDotNet` namespace references in `YamlSerializer.cs`.
- **Documentation & Planning:** - Extensively updated `CLAUDE.md` and `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` to document the new Modular Monolith architectural boundaries, the MagickImage-First approach, and comprehensive XML documentation standards. - Added `conductor/plan.md` to document the implementation strategy for the new text composer.

refactor(workflows)!: (not done) rebuild generation pipeline with strict phase boundaries and internal gating
This commit represents a complete rewrite of the slide generation pipeline. The workflow has been redesigned into a strict 3-phase, item-parallel architecture that natively leverages WorkflowCore iterators, improving resource management, concurrency, and idempotency.
- **Project Restructuring:** - Renamed the `SlideGenerator.Workflows` project to `SlideGenerator.Pipelines`. - Replaced old state models with a strongly-typed `Recipe` model, explicit `Instructions` (Text/Image), and robust `Identifiers` (Book, Sheet, Presentation, Slide, Shape).
- **Generating Workflow Rewrite:** - Implemented a strict 3-phase pipeline: Phase A (Validation & Setup), Phase B (Resource Preparation), and Phase C (Assembly & Finalization). - Enforced single-item iteration using WorkflowCore's native `.ForEach()`, eliminating internal `foreach` and `Task.WhenAll` loops within individual activities. - Replaced batch-processing steps with granular, single-task steps (`ValidateRequest`, `CreateTemplate`, `PrepareIterationTasks`, `ExtractShapeBounds`, `ExtractRowData`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ReplaceShapeData`, `FinalizePresentation`).
- **Internalized Concurrency Control:** - Deleted the generic `AcquireSlotStep` and `ReleaseSlotStep` workflow nodes. - Injected `GateLocker` directly into workflow steps, acquiring and releasing locks explicitly around specific I/O-bound operations (e.g., `ReadWorkbook`, `EditPresentation`, `DownloadImage`).
- **State Management:** - Overhauled `GeneratingData` to use `ConcurrentBag` for managing flat lists of iteration tasks (`RowTask`, `ShapeTask`, `ImageTask`) mapped from the preparation phase. - Replaced the heavy file-leasing registry pattern with direct file stream access strictly protected by `GateLocker`.
- **Scanning Service Migration:** - Removed `ScanningWorkflow` and its associated workflow activities. - Introduced a direct `ScanningService` that uses `ExcelEngine` and `SfPresentation` for faster, non-orchestrated metadata extraction.
- **Image and ROI Refactoring:** - Converted `RoiOption` and its derived types (`CenterOption`, `RuleOfThirdsOption`) to immutable records. - Simplified `RoiCalculator` implementations to consume `RoiOption` directly without type-casting generic arguments.
- **Documentation & Standards:** - Added `Pipeline.md` and `Workflow.md` to clearly document the new logical workflow and architectural phases. - Extensively updated `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` and `CLAUDE.md` to reflect the new modular monolith rules, strict WorkflowCore iteration constraints, and image processing best practices.

refactor(generating): restructure Recipe model to use node-based mapping and exact column identifiers
- Replaced the flat `Graph` mapping in `Recipe` with a collection of `MapNode` objects, encapsulating target sheets, a target slide, and specific text and image instructions. - Introduced `ColumnIdentifier` (inheriting from `SheetIdentifier`) to explicitly tie columns to their exact workbook and sheet origins. - Updated `TextInstruction` and `ImageInstruction` to use collections of `ColumnIdentifier` instead of raw string column names. - Introduced `ValidationItem` to encapsulate sheet and map node data during the `GeneratingWorkflow` validation phase. - Updated `ExtractRowData` and `ReplaceShapeData` workflow steps to retrieve instructions from the associated `MapNode` and strictly match column identifiers against the current sheet context. - Modified `ValidatedWorksheet` to store its parent `MapNode`, ensuring context-aware instruction lookups in downstream pipeline tasks. - Adopted modern C# collection expressions (`[]`) for concurrent bags and hash sets in `GeneratingData` and `ReplaceShapeData`.

feat(generating): add fallback image support and simplify ROI resolution
- Introduced `FallbackImagePath` to `ImageInstruction` and `GeneratingData`, ensuring the path is automatically resolved to an absolute path when provided. - Updated `ExtractRowData` to pass the `FallbackImagePath` into the constructed `ImageTask`. - Modified the `EditImage` workflow step to utilize the fallback image when the primary source file is missing or no `SourceUri` is provided. - Updated cleanup logic in `EditImage` to prevent deleting the source image if the fallback image was used. - Refactored `RoiResolver.CalculateRoiAsync` to determine the algorithm type directly from the `RoiOption.Type` property, removing the redundant `RoiType` parameter.

refactor(identifiers): standardize naming and adopt strongly typed models
- Renamed path properties across identifier records for consistency (e.g., `BookFilePath` to `BookPath`, `PresentationFilePath` to `PresentationPath`). - Refactored `ShapeIdentifier` to use a `string ShapeName` instead of a hashed `uint ShapeId`. - Changed `SlideIndex` from `uint` to `int` in `SlideIdentifier`. - Updated scanning request and summary models (`BookSummaryRequest`, `PresentationSummaryRequest`, `WorksheetSummary`, `SlideSummary`, `ShapeSummary`) to use strongly typed identifiers instead of flat primitive properties. - Modified `ExtractRowData`, `ExtractShapeBounds`, and `ReplaceShapeData` workflow steps to utilize explicit string `ShapeName` matching rather than hashed integer IDs. - Updated `GeneratingData` to use `ShapeIdentifier` as the key for the `ShapeBounds` dictionary and `ShapeName` in `ShapeTask`. - Renamed `PresentationExtension` to `OutputExtension` in `GeneratingRequest`. - Updated `ScanningService` to natively handle the new identifier-based request and summary models.

refactor(generating): restructure workflow tasks
- Updated namespaces and project references from Gate to Coordinator for consistency. - Refactored workflow tasks to utilize the new GeneratingTask model, enhancing clarity and maintainability. - Consolidated data extraction and task creation processes for improved efficiency.

refactor(generating): restructure workflow tasks
- Updated namespaces and project references from Gate to Coordinator for consistency. - Refactored workflow tasks to utilize the new GeneratingTask model, enhancing clarity and maintainability. - Consolidated data extraction and task creation processes for improved efficiency.

feat(logging): introduce database-backed logging and replace in-memory error tracking
- Created the `SlideGenerator.Logging` project to provide structured, database-backed logging via Entity Framework Core and Serilog. - Introduced `LogEntry` and `ExceptionIdentifier` models, alongside the `ILogDbContext` interface. - Implemented `WorkflowDatabaseSink`, a custom Serilog sink that batches log events and persists them to the database, explicitly extracting `TaskId`, `Path`, and exception details. - Removed the `Errors` concurrent dictionary from the `GeneratingTask` model, shifting error management to the new centralized logging system. - Integrated `ILogger` dependency injection into all generating workflow steps (`ValidateRequest`, `CreateTemplate`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ExtractData`, `ReplaceSlideData`, `CloseAllHandles`). - Added rich contextual logging across workflow steps using `.ForContext("TaskId", context.Workflow.Id)` and `.ForContext("Path", ...)` to provide granular visibility into task execution, idempotency checks, and error handling. - Deleted the obsolete `conductor/plan.md` implementation plan.

docs: add comprehensive XML documentation and standardize extension methods
- **Extensive XML Documentation:** Added detailed summaries, parameter descriptions, exceptions, and return value definitions to data models, identifiers, workflow tasks, configuration settings, and core services across the `SlideGenerator.Settings`, `SlideGenerator.Pipelines`, and `SlideGenerator.Logging` projects. - **Standardized Extension Methods:** Refactored `GeneratingTask` resource management utilities in `SlideGenerator.Pipelines.Generating`, replacing the experimental `extension` syntax with standard C# static extension methods (`GetOrOpenWorkbook` and `GetOrOpenTemplate`). - **Logging Registration:** Introduced `Registration.cs` in `SlideGenerator.Logging` to expose `AddWorkflowLogging`, centralizing the dependency injection setup for the custom `WorkflowDatabaseSink`.

docs: update architectural guidelines and AI assistant instructions
- Updated `CLAUDE.md` to provide clearer guidance for AI assistants, reflecting recent architectural changes and module responsibilities. - Renamed references from the `Gate` module to `Coordinator` and added the new `SlideGenerator.Logging` module to the architecture maps in both `CLAUDE.md` and `INSTRUCTIONS.MD`. - Added a specific section detailing dependency injection registration methods for each module. - Clarified concurrency management guidelines using `GateLocker` and enumerated the available gate types. - Detailed the three-phase orchestration pipeline (Validation & Setup, Resource Prep, Assembly & Cleanup) and updated state tracking documentation to use the new `GeneratingTask` data model. - Updated the invariants checklist in `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` to explicitly restrict workflow constructors to only inject `IServiceProvider` rather than concrete services.

refactor(workflows): centralize workflow-scoped logging in GeneratingTask
- Introduced a `Logger` property and `TryInitLogger` method to `GeneratingTask` to cache a single, workflow-scoped logger enriched with the `TaskId`. - Updated all generating workflow steps (`CloseAllHandles`, `CreateTemplate`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ExtractData`, `ReplaceSlideData`, `ValidateRequest`) to initialize and utilize the centralized `data.Logger`. - Removed redundant `logger.ForContext("TaskId", context.Workflow.Id)` calls throughout step execution and error handling blocks. - Refactored private helper methods (e.g., `ReadWorkbookMetadataAsync`, `CloneSlidesAndExtractShapeDataAsync`, `ApplyTextReplacements`, `CreateTemplateFileAsync`) by dropping the `IStepExecutionContext` parameter, as it is no longer needed for localized logger context enrichment.

refactor(pipelines): rename Services project to Pipelines and update namespaces
- Renamed the `SlideGenerator.Services` project to `SlideGenerator.Pipelines` and updated the `SlideGenerator.slnx` solution file. - Updated namespaces across all models, steps, workflows, and services (e.g., `Generating`, `Scanning`) to reflect the new `SlideGenerator.Pipelines` root namespace. - Moved `ILogDbContext` to the `Abstractions` folder within the `SlideGenerator.Logging` project and updated its namespace to `SlideGenerator.Logging.Abstractions`. - Updated `WorkflowDatabaseSink` to reference the new logging abstractions namespace. - Relocated `Pipeline.md` to the `Generating/Workflows/` directory. - Added a `.DotSettings` file to configure ReSharper code inspection for the `Pipelines` project.

feat(logging): add Serilog configuration and logging paths
- Introduced appsettings.json for Serilog configuration (enables structured logging). - Added LoggingPaths class to define log folder path (centralizes logging path management). - Updated service registrations to include logging services (enhances logging capabilities).

refactor: update namespaces and improve code structure for document handling
- Changed references from SlideGenerator.Slides and SlideGenerator.Sheets to SlideGenerator.Documents in multiple files (to unify document handling). - Added new document-related services and utilities for PowerPoint and Excel (to enhance functionality and maintainability).

MESSAGE.value: chore(backend): clean up and reformat code

refactor(generating): resolve instructions per-row instead of pre-flattening
- Introduced the `InstructionResolver` service to evaluate general instructions against row content and produce specialized instructions with actual values. - Updated the `ISpecializable.Flatten` method signature to require row data, shifting value resolution logic to the execution phase. - Modified `SpecializedInstruction` models for both images and texts to store resolved values (`Uri` and `string`) rather than column source definitions. - Refactored the `SpecializeInstructions` activity to filter and store general instructions in the context, removing premature flattening. - Adapted `ResolveImageUrls`, `DownloadImage`, `ResolveImagePathsFromDisk`, and `ReplaceSlideContents` activities to process the new instruction structure and per-row resolved values. - Added a `Utilities.NormalizeUri` helper to standardize URI formatting during image resolution.

refactor(workflows)!: transition to custom C# DSL and WorkflowCore
- Introduced a custom Workflow-as-Code DSL (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`, `SlotGatedNode`) in the Application layer. - Implemented strongly-typed, stateless `Variable<T>` and `IActivityContext` for lexical scoping and isolated state management across concurrent branches. - Integrated `WorkflowCore` in the Infrastructure layer to interpret and execute the custom DSL via a single `WcInterpreterStep`. - Refactored `GeneratingWorkflow` and all related activities to implement `ILeafActivity<WorkflowTask>`, completely removing dependencies on Elsa. - Added hierarchical state monitoring (`ExecutionState`, `WorkflowState`) and thread-safe, in-memory logging (`Logger`, `LogEntry`). - Replaced `ScanningService` with modular `ScanWorkbook` and `ScanPresentation` leaf activities. - Redesigned temporary output paths to use deterministic, hash-based folder structures for downloaded and edited images. - Renamed replacer abstractions to composers (e.g., `ITextReplacer` to `ITextComposer`, `IImageReplacer` to `IImageComposer`). - Extended the `IImage` interface and its `Mat` implementation with `Crop`, `Resize`, and `SaveAsync` capabilities. - Updated `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` and `CLAUDE.md` to document the new DSL architecture, variable scoping rules, and strict dependency constraints.

refactor: reorganize application core features into Modules directory
- Relocated multiple root application directories (Cloud, Download, Images, Resources, Settings, Slides, Systems, Workflows) into a new `Modules` directory to improve project organization. - Updated namespaces and using directives across the Application and Infrastructure layers to align with the new `Modules` path structure. - Moved WorkflowCore-specific infrastructure implementations (e.g., `WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcExecutionContext`) into a dedicated `Adapters` subfolder within `SlideGenerator.Infrastructure/Workflows`. - Deleted the obsolete `AssemblyInfo.cs` file from the Application project. - Updated the Application `.csproj` file to replace the old `Cloud` folder inclusion with the new `Modules` directory.
[skip ci] chore: Update Instructions

refactor(workflows)!: transition to variable-based persistence and robust resource locking
- Replaced `ExecutionState` with `ExecutionSnapshot`, splitting transient context (`IExecutionContext`) from persisted variables (`IExecutionPayload`). - Eliminated mutable state objects (e.g., `SheetTask`) in favor of strict, scope-based `Variable<T>` persistence for workflow execution. - Refactored `Registry` implementations to support shared-read/exclusive-write locking using `FileLocker`. - Introduced `GateLocker`, `GateNode`, and `GateType`, replacing `SlotGatedNode` and `SlotType` for granular concurrency throttling. - Extracted custom DSL interpretation logic from `WcInterpreterStep` into a dedicated `WorkflowInterpreter` service. - Updated generation and scanning activities to manage data, instructions, and open file leases exclusively through scope variables. - Introduced `Lease<T>` and `ILock` abstractions for reliable, strongly-typed resource lifecycle management. - Updated documentation (INSTRUCTIONS.MD, CLAUDE.md) to reflect new variable scope rules, registry patterns, and strict architectural constraints.
[skip ci] chore(backend): reformat and cleanup code

refactor(infrastructure): Transition to Syncfusion libraries for slide and sheet processing
- Replaced OpenXML and ClosedXML implementations with Syncfusion equivalents (e.g., SfPresentation, SfReadOnlyWorkbook, SfImageComposer, SfTextComposer). - Moved sheet identifier models (e.g., WorkbookIdentifier, WorksheetIdentifier) to the Models.Identifiers namespace for better organization. - Introduced GetPreview methods in IReadOnlyWorksheet, IReadOnlySlide, and IReadOnlyShape to generate lightweight visual and data previews. - Simplified SlidePreview to only retain the index and image, promoting Id and Name metadata to SlideSummary. - Updated ScanWorkbook and ScanPresentation activities to adopt the new preview rendering approaches. - Removed the Scan method from IImageComposer as preview extraction is now handled directly by shapes. - Cleaned up obsolete XML and ClosedXML adapters, services, and the GeneratingService. - Added Syncfusion packages to the infrastructure project dependencies.

refactor(workflows): extract ScanningWorkflow and remove WorkflowTask wrapper
- Removed `WorkflowTask` class and updated generating activities and nodes to consume `GeneratingRequest` directly. - Introduced `ScanningWorkflow` and `ScanningRequest` to encapsulate and separate scanning logic from generation. - Created `ScanningVariables` to define specific variables for scanning, aliasing them within `VariablesDeclaration`. - Updated `GeneratingWorkflow` to execute the new `ScanningWorkflow` during its initial parallel scanning phase. - Modified `ScanWorkbook` and `ScanPresentation` activities to implement `ILeafActivity<object>`, improving reusability. - Added `TryGetVariable` to `IActivityContext` and implemented it in `WcInterpreterContext` for safer variable resolution across nested scopes.

```text refactor(workflows): replace centralized interpreter with self-executing activity DSL
- Removed the centralized `WorkflowInterpreter` and record-based DSL nodes (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`). - Introduced an object-oriented `Activity<TData>` base class with self-executing implementations (`Sequence`, `Parallel`, `ForEach`, `Try`, `Condition`, `Inline`, `GateWrapper`). - Renamed `Variable<T>` to `Handle<T>` to better represent workflow-scoped references. - Renamed `IActivityContext` to `IExecutionContext`, renaming the `State` property to `Snapshot` and exposing an `IServiceProvider` for internal dependency resolution. - Renamed `IWorkflowDefinition` to `IWorkflow` and updated implementations to construct activity trees using the new DSL. - Refactored `GateLocker` to be a generic `GateLocker<TGate>` that accepts a resolver function for determining concurrency limits. - Updated all leaf activities to implement `Activity<TData>` instead of `ILeafActivity<TData>`. - Updated WorkflowCore infrastructure adapters (`WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcInterpreterContext`) to support the new interface types and execute the activity tree directly. - Updated architectural documentation (`INSTRUCTIONS.MD`, `CLAUDE.md`) to reflect the new terminology and scope management guidelines. ```

refactor(workflows): replace centralized interpreter with self-executing activity DSL
- Removed the centralized `WorkflowInterpreter` and record-based DSL nodes (e.g., `SequenceNode`, `ForEachNode`, `TryNode`). - Introduced an object-oriented `Activity<TData>` base class with self-executing implementations (`Sequence`, `Parallel`, `ForEach`, `Try`, `Condition`, `Inline`, `GateWrapper`). - Renamed `Variable<T>` to `Handle<T>` to better represent workflow-scoped references. - Renamed `IActivityContext` to `IExecutionContext`, renaming the `State` property to `Snapshot` and exposing an `IServiceProvider` for internal dependency resolution. - Renamed `IWorkflowDefinition` to `IWorkflow` and updated implementations to construct activity trees using the new DSL. - Refactored `GateLocker` to be a generic `GateLocker<TGate>` that accepts a resolver function for determining concurrency limits. - Updated all leaf activities to implement `Activity<TData>` instead of `ILeafActivity<TData>`. - Updated WorkflowCore infrastructure adapters (`WcWorkflowService`, `WcInterpreterStep`, `WcInterpreterContext`) to support the new interface types and execute the activity tree directly. - Updated architectural documentation (`INSTRUCTIONS.MD`, `CLAUDE.md`) to reflect the new terminology and scope management guidelines.

refactor!: restructure solution into feature-based projects and standardize on Syncfusion
This commit represents a major architectural refactoring, migrating from a traditional layered architecture (Application, Domain, Infrastructure) to a feature-sliced design. It also removes complex abstraction layers over file formats by standardizing exclusively on Syncfusion libraries for document processing.
- **Restructured Solution Architecture:** - Replaced `SlideGenerator.Application`, `SlideGenerator.Domain`, and `SlideGenerator.Infrastructure` with specialized feature projects: `Cloud`, `Download`, `Gate`, `Images`, `Registry`, `Settings`, `Sheets`, `Slides`, and `Workflows`.
- **Standardized on Syncfusion:** - Removed OpenXML and ClosedXML dependencies entirely. - Deleted custom document abstractions (`IPresentation`, `IReadOnlyWorkbook`, `IShape`, `ISlide`) in favor of directly utilizing `Syncfusion.Presentation.NET` and `Syncfusion.XlsIO.NET`. - Refactored `SfTextComposer` and `SfImageComposer` to operate directly on Syncfusion components.
- **Simplified External Integrations:** - Removed generic abstraction interfaces such as `IClientService`, `IDownloadService`, and `IImageDecoder`. - Adopted direct usage of `HttpClient`, `Downloader`, `Magick.NET`, and `OpenCvSharp` in their respective feature modules. - Moved Face Detection (`YuNet`) and ROI calculations into the `Images` project, and included the `YuNet.onnx` model binary natively.
- **Refactored Workflows:** - Moved `GeneratingWorkflow`, `ScanningWorkflow`, and all related steps to the `Workflows` project. - Updated workflow state data and activities to consume the new feature-sliced services and Syncfusion models.
- **Streamlined Settings and Concurrency:** - Consolidated configuration and YAML serialization into `SlideGenerator.Settings`. - Moved concurrency gating logic into `SlideGenerator.Gate`. - Simplified asynchronous file locking into a generic `FileRegistry<T>` in `SlideGenerator.Registry`.

refactor(images,slides): adopt MagickImage-first architecture and static composers
This commit migrates the primary image processing pipeline from OpenCV to ImageMagick and refactors the Syncfusion slide composition services to use static utility classes, simplifying dependency management and improving image handling.
- **MagickImage-First Architecture:** - Updated `SlideGenerator.Images` to use `MagickImage` as the primary format for image manipulation. - Modified `RoiResolver`, `RoiCalculator`, `CenterRoi`, and `RuleOfThirdsRoi` to accept `MagickImage`, converting to OpenCV `Mat` internally only when required for face detection. - Refactored `Images/Utilities.cs` by replacing `Mat`-based operations with `ToMat()` and `ToMagick()` format conversion extensions. - Updated the `EditImage` workflow activity to use `MagickImage` for decoding, cropping, and resizing operations instead of relying on `IImageDecoder` and OpenCV.
- **Static Slide Composers:** - Replaced injected `SfImageComposer` and `SfTextComposer` with static `ImageComposer` and `TextComposer` classes. - Enhanced `TextComposer` with intelligent context-aware data parsing (Excel arrays, JSON, comma-separated values) before rendering mustache templates via Stubble. - Enhanced `ImageComposer` to support direct replacements using `MagickImage`, `Stream`, and `byte[]`. - Recreated `Slides/Utilities.cs` to provide static extension methods for extracting shape and slide previews natively as `MagickImage` instances. - Updated `EditSlide` activity to consume the static composers directly, removing them from constructor injection. - Deleted `SlidesRegistration.cs` as the slide services are now static utilities.
- **Project Configuration & Restructuring:** - Disabled packing by adding `<IsPackable>false</IsPackable>` to all module `.csproj` files (`Cloud`, `Download`, `Gate`, `Images`, `Settings`, `Sheets`, `Slides`). - Removed the `Syncfusion.PresentationRenderer.NET` dependency from the `Slides` project. - Reorganized `Slides` project structure by moving `PresentationExtension.cs` to `Models/` and `SfPresentation.cs` to `Entities/`. - Fixed `YamlDotNet` namespace references in `YamlSerializer.cs`.
- **Documentation & Planning:** - Extensively updated `CLAUDE.md` and `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` to document the new Modular Monolith architectural boundaries, the MagickImage-First approach, and comprehensive XML documentation standards. - Added `conductor/plan.md` to document the implementation strategy for the new text composer.

refactor(workflows)!: (not done) rebuild generation pipeline with strict phase boundaries and internal gating
This commit represents a complete rewrite of the slide generation pipeline. The workflow has been redesigned into a strict 3-phase, item-parallel architecture that natively leverages WorkflowCore iterators, improving resource management, concurrency, and idempotency.
- **Project Restructuring:** - Renamed the `SlideGenerator.Workflows` project to `SlideGenerator.Pipelines`. - Replaced old state models with a strongly-typed `Recipe` model, explicit `Instructions` (Text/Image), and robust `Identifiers` (Book, Sheet, Presentation, Slide, Shape).
- **Generating Workflow Rewrite:** - Implemented a strict 3-phase pipeline: Phase A (Validation & Setup), Phase B (Resource Preparation), and Phase C (Assembly & Finalization). - Enforced single-item iteration using WorkflowCore's native `.ForEach()`, eliminating internal `foreach` and `Task.WhenAll` loops within individual activities. - Replaced batch-processing steps with granular, single-task steps (`ValidateRequest`, `CreateTemplate`, `PrepareIterationTasks`, `ExtractShapeBounds`, `ExtractRowData`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ReplaceShapeData`, `FinalizePresentation`).
- **Internalized Concurrency Control:** - Deleted the generic `AcquireSlotStep` and `ReleaseSlotStep` workflow nodes. - Injected `GateLocker` directly into workflow steps, acquiring and releasing locks explicitly around specific I/O-bound operations (e.g., `ReadWorkbook`, `EditPresentation`, `DownloadImage`).
- **State Management:** - Overhauled `GeneratingData` to use `ConcurrentBag` for managing flat lists of iteration tasks (`RowTask`, `ShapeTask`, `ImageTask`) mapped from the preparation phase. - Replaced the heavy file-leasing registry pattern with direct file stream access strictly protected by `GateLocker`.
- **Scanning Service Migration:** - Removed `ScanningWorkflow` and its associated workflow activities. - Introduced a direct `ScanningService` that uses `ExcelEngine` and `SfPresentation` for faster, non-orchestrated metadata extraction.
- **Image and ROI Refactoring:** - Converted `RoiOption` and its derived types (`CenterOption`, `RuleOfThirdsOption`) to immutable records. - Simplified `RoiCalculator` implementations to consume `RoiOption` directly without type-casting generic arguments.
- **Documentation & Standards:** - Added `Pipeline.md` and `Workflow.md` to clearly document the new logical workflow and architectural phases. - Extensively updated `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` and `CLAUDE.md` to reflect the new modular monolith rules, strict WorkflowCore iteration constraints, and image processing best practices.

refactor(generating): restructure Recipe model to use node-based mapping and exact column identifiers
- Replaced the flat `Graph` mapping in `Recipe` with a collection of `MapNode` objects, encapsulating target sheets, a target slide, and specific text and image instructions. - Introduced `ColumnIdentifier` (inheriting from `SheetIdentifier`) to explicitly tie columns to their exact workbook and sheet origins. - Updated `TextInstruction` and `ImageInstruction` to use collections of `ColumnIdentifier` instead of raw string column names. - Introduced `ValidationItem` to encapsulate sheet and map node data during the `GeneratingWorkflow` validation phase. - Updated `ExtractRowData` and `ReplaceShapeData` workflow steps to retrieve instructions from the associated `MapNode` and strictly match column identifiers against the current sheet context. - Modified `ValidatedWorksheet` to store its parent `MapNode`, ensuring context-aware instruction lookups in downstream pipeline tasks. - Adopted modern C# collection expressions (`[]`) for concurrent bags and hash sets in `GeneratingData` and `ReplaceShapeData`.

feat(generating): add fallback image support and simplify ROI resolution
- Introduced `FallbackImagePath` to `ImageInstruction` and `GeneratingData`, ensuring the path is automatically resolved to an absolute path when provided. - Updated `ExtractRowData` to pass the `FallbackImagePath` into the constructed `ImageTask`. - Modified the `EditImage` workflow step to utilize the fallback image when the primary source file is missing or no `SourceUri` is provided. - Updated cleanup logic in `EditImage` to prevent deleting the source image if the fallback image was used. - Refactored `RoiResolver.CalculateRoiAsync` to determine the algorithm type directly from the `RoiOption.Type` property, removing the redundant `RoiType` parameter.

refactor(identifiers): standardize naming and adopt strongly typed models
- Renamed path properties across identifier records for consistency (e.g., `BookFilePath` to `BookPath`, `PresentationFilePath` to `PresentationPath`). - Refactored `ShapeIdentifier` to use a `string ShapeName` instead of a hashed `uint ShapeId`. - Changed `SlideIndex` from `uint` to `int` in `SlideIdentifier`. - Updated scanning request and summary models (`BookSummaryRequest`, `PresentationSummaryRequest`, `WorksheetSummary`, `SlideSummary`, `ShapeSummary`) to use strongly typed identifiers instead of flat primitive properties. - Modified `ExtractRowData`, `ExtractShapeBounds`, and `ReplaceShapeData` workflow steps to utilize explicit string `ShapeName` matching rather than hashed integer IDs. - Updated `GeneratingData` to use `ShapeIdentifier` as the key for the `ShapeBounds` dictionary and `ShapeName` in `ShapeTask`. - Renamed `PresentationExtension` to `OutputExtension` in `GeneratingRequest`. - Updated `ScanningService` to natively handle the new identifier-based request and summary models.

refactor(generating): restructure workflow tasks
- Updated namespaces and project references from Gate to Coordinator for consistency. - Refactored workflow tasks to utilize the new GeneratingTask model, enhancing clarity and maintainability. - Consolidated data extraction and task creation processes for improved efficiency.

feat(logging): introduce database-backed logging and replace in-memory error tracking
- Created the `SlideGenerator.Logging` project to provide structured, database-backed logging via Entity Framework Core and Serilog. - Introduced `LogEntry` and `ExceptionIdentifier` models, alongside the `ILogDbContext` interface. - Implemented `WorkflowDatabaseSink`, a custom Serilog sink that batches log events and persists them to the database, explicitly extracting `TaskId`, `Path`, and exception details. - Removed the `Errors` concurrent dictionary from the `GeneratingTask` model, shifting error management to the new centralized logging system. - Integrated `ILogger` dependency injection into all generating workflow steps (`ValidateRequest`, `CreateTemplate`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ExtractData`, `ReplaceSlideData`, `CloseAllHandles`). - Added rich contextual logging across workflow steps using `.ForContext("TaskId", context.Workflow.Id)` and `.ForContext("Path", ...)` to provide granular visibility into task execution, idempotency checks, and error handling. - Deleted the obsolete `conductor/plan.md` implementation plan.

docs: add comprehensive XML documentation and standardize extension methods
- **Extensive XML Documentation:** Added detailed summaries, parameter descriptions, exceptions, and return value definitions to data models, identifiers, workflow tasks, configuration settings, and core services across the `SlideGenerator.Settings`, `SlideGenerator.Pipelines`, and `SlideGenerator.Logging` projects. - **Standardized Extension Methods:** Refactored `GeneratingTask` resource management utilities in `SlideGenerator.Pipelines.Generating`, replacing the experimental `extension` syntax with standard C# static extension methods (`GetOrOpenWorkbook` and `GetOrOpenTemplate`). - **Logging Registration:** Introduced `Registration.cs` in `SlideGenerator.Logging` to expose `AddWorkflowLogging`, centralizing the dependency injection setup for the custom `WorkflowDatabaseSink`.

docs: update architectural guidelines and AI assistant instructions
- Updated `CLAUDE.md` to provide clearer guidance for AI assistants, reflecting recent architectural changes and module responsibilities. - Renamed references from the `Gate` module to `Coordinator` and added the new `SlideGenerator.Logging` module to the architecture maps in both `CLAUDE.md` and `INSTRUCTIONS.MD`. - Added a specific section detailing dependency injection registration methods for each module. - Clarified concurrency management guidelines using `GateLocker` and enumerated the available gate types. - Detailed the three-phase orchestration pipeline (Validation & Setup, Resource Prep, Assembly & Cleanup) and updated state tracking documentation to use the new `GeneratingTask` data model. - Updated the invariants checklist in `INSTRUCTIONS.MD` to explicitly restrict workflow constructors to only inject `IServiceProvider` rather than concrete services.

refactor(workflows): centralize workflow-scoped logging in GeneratingTask
- Introduced a `Logger` property and `TryInitLogger` method to `GeneratingTask` to cache a single, workflow-scoped logger enriched with the `TaskId`. - Updated all generating workflow steps (`CloseAllHandles`, `CreateTemplate`, `DownloadImage`, `EditImage`, `ExtractData`, `ReplaceSlideData`, `ValidateRequest`) to initialize and utilize the centralized `data.Logger`. - Removed redundant `logger.ForContext("TaskId", context.Workflow.Id)` calls throughout step execution and error handling blocks. - Refactored private helper methods (e.g., `ReadWorkbookMetadataAsync`, `CloneSlidesAndExtractShapeDataAsync`, `ApplyTextReplacements`, `CreateTemplateFileAsync`) by dropping the `IStepExecutionContext` parameter, as it is no longer needed for localized logger context enrichment.

refactor(pipelines): rename Services project to Pipelines and update namespaces
- Renamed the `SlideGenerator.Services` project to `SlideGenerator.Pipelines` and updated the `SlideGenerator.slnx` solution file. - Updated namespaces across all models, steps, workflows, and services (e.g., `Generating`, `Scanning`) to reflect the new `SlideGenerator.Pipelines` root namespace. - Moved `ILogDbContext` to the `Abstractions` folder within the `SlideGenerator.Logging` project and updated its namespace to `SlideGenerator.Logging.Abstractions`. - Updated `WorkflowDatabaseSink` to reference the new logging abstractions namespace. - Relocated `Pipeline.md` to the `Generating/Workflows/` directory. - Added a `.DotSettings` file to configure ReSharper code inspection for the `Pipelines` project.

feat(logging): add Serilog configuration and logging paths
- Introduced appsettings.json for Serilog configuration (enables structured logging). - Added LoggingPaths class to define log folder path (centralizes logging path management). - Updated service registrations to include logging services (enhances logging capabilities).

refactor: update namespaces and improve code structure for document handling
- Changed references from SlideGenerator.Slides and SlideGenerator.Sheets to SlideGenerator.Documents in multiple files (to unify document handling). - Added new document-related services and utilities for PowerPoint and Excel (to enhance functionality and maintainability).

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
refactor: update namespaces and improve code structure for document handling
- Changed references from SlideGenerator.Slides and SlideGenerator.Sheets to SlideGenerator.Documents in multiple files (to unify document handling). - Added new document-related services and utilities for PowerPoint and Excel (to enhance functionality and maintainability).
